mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE str_to_date(request_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = str_to_date(date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') and state != 144
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE str_to_date(request_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = str_to_date(date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') and state = 200
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE str_to_date(request_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = str_to_date(date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') and state != 144 and state = 200
SELECT SUM(count_price) value FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE str_to_date( request_date , '%Y-%m-%d' ) = str_to_date( date_format(now() , '%Y-%m-%d') , '%Y-%m-%d' ) and state != 144

SELECT str_to_date(request_date, '%Y-%m-%d') label, SUM(count_price) VALUE FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE str_to_date( request_date , '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= str_to_date( #{beginDate} , '%Y-%m-%d' ) AND str_to_date( request_date , '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= str_to_date( #{endDate} , '%Y-%m-%d' ) AND state != 144 GROUP BY str_to_date( request_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) ORDER BY str_to_date( request_date, '%Y-%m-%d' )

SELECT SUBSTR(str_to_date(request_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), 1, 7) label, SUM(count_price) VALUE FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE str_to_date( request_date , '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= str_to_date( #{beginDate} , '%Y-%m-%d' ) AND str_to_date( request_date , '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= str_to_date( #{endDate} , '%Y-%m-%d' ) AND state != 144 GROUP BY SUBSTR( str_to_date( request_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ), 1, 7 ) ORDER BY SUBSTR( str_to_date( request_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ), 1, 7 )

SELECT id value, entrustment_no label FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') UNION ALL SELECT entrustment_id, task_code FROM test_task WHERE task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') UNION ALL SELECT entrustment_id, report_code FROM test_report_record WHERE report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') UNION ALL SELECT entrust_id, report_code FROM test_report_record WHERE report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') UNION ALL SELECT entrust_id, report_code FROM test_report_record_mid WHERE report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')
